title: Fireblocks Intros Stablecoin Lending for Institutional Clients
message_html: Fireblocks Intros Stablecoin Lending for Institutional Clients ...
snippet: Fireblocks has debuted a feature that lets institutional customers lend stablecoins directly through its platform. The company’s Earn tool, announced Wednesday (April 15), allows users to supply capital to two decentralized finance (DeFi) protocols, Morpho and Aave, while maintaining the same securi
